What is the breadth and length and height and depth of Christ's love for us, so that we may be filled with the fullness of God?<|11.54|> <|12.64|> I can't help but wonder if Browning borrowed this about.<|15.02|> <|15.40|> This divine love is not knowledge gained by private study, but loved, learned through the fellowship of the church.<|25.04|> <|25.04|> This is what the church is <|12.12|> We are loving Christ in others by sharing our abundance this morning.<|18.38|> <|18.76|> And every time, we join together to enact God's imagining.<|24.82|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> We are, as those Uber hostesses do so well, opening our hands and loosening our grip,<|9.58|> <|11.04|> opening our hearts and trusting that together
